'''yalunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avatarfag|avatarfag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avatarfag|avatarfag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yalunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yælinith|yælinith]] || [[word:yælinij|yælinij]] || [[word:yælinish|yælinish]] || [[word:yælini|yælini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yalulunuth|yalulunuth]] || [[word:yalulunuj|yalulunuj]] || [[word:yalulunush|yalulunush]] || [[word:yalulunu|yalulunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yalunuth|yalunuth]] || [[word:yalunuj|yalunuj]] || [[word:yalunush|yalunush]] || [[word:yalunu|yalunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yalufnuth|yalufnuth]] || [[word:yalufnuj|yalufnuj]] || [[word:yalufnush|yalufnush]] || [[word:yalufnuf|yalufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yalunuthu|yalunuthu]] || [[word:yalunuju|yalunuju]] || [[word:yalunushu|yalunushu]] || [[word:yalunuku|yalunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yalunuth|yalunuth]] || [[word:yalunuj|yalunuj]] || [[word:yalunush|yalunush]] || [[word:yalunu|yalunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yalunuthul|yalunuthul]] || [[word:yalunujul|yalunujul]] || [[word:yalunushul|yalunushul]] || [[word:yalunukul|yalunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yalunuthuthu|yalunuthuthu]] || [[word:yalunujuju|yalunujuju]] || [[word:yalunushushu|yalunushushu]] || [[word:yalunuku|yalunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yalunuthun|yalunuthun]] || [[word:yalunujun|yalunujun]] || [[word:yalunushun|yalunushun]] || [[word:yalunukun|yalunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yalunuthuoro|yalunuthuoro]] || [[word:yalunujuoro|yalunujuoro]] || [[word:yalunushuoro|yalunushuoro]] || [[word:yalunukuoro|yalunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
